summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.workflow; import java.util.Map; import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap; import java.util.List; import java.util.ArrayList; public class WorkflowStepRegistry { private static final WorkflowStepRegistry instance = new WorkflowStepRegistry(); private final Map<String, WorkflowStep> steps = new ConcurrentHashMap<>(); private final Map<String, List<String>> sessionSteps = new ConcurrentHashMap<>(); private WorkflowStepRegistry() {} public static WorkflowStepRegistry getInstance() { return instance; } public void registerStep(String sessionId, WorkflowStep step) { steps.put(step.getId(), step); sessionSteps.computeIfAbsent(sessionId, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(step.getId()); } public WorkflowStep getStep(String stepId) { return steps.get(stepId); } public List<WorkflowStep> getStepsForSession(String sessionId) { List<WorkflowStep> result = new ArrayList<>();
